summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Trust But Verify™ investor demo app. All 11 features/flows tested successfully. App is fully functional with all hardcoded data working correctly. Frontend-only app works offline as expected.

backend_issues.note: Frontend-only app - no backend APIs. All data is hardcoded (CITY_DATA, BOTTLE_BRANDS)

code_quality.issue: React key warning - duplicate keys '99%+' in stats array at line 233
code_quality.details: Array map uses value as key, but '99%+' appears twice causing React warning. Does not affect functionality.

passed_tests: ✓ Home tab loads with 'My Address' toggle selected by default
✓ Chicago address scan (1234 W Wacker Dr, Chicago IL) works correctly
✓ 6-step scan animation plays sequentially with checkmarks
✓ Report loads with risk gauge animating from 0 to 98 for Chicago
✓ HIGH RISK alert shows Lead, Chromium-6, PFAS (Total)
✓ Lifetime Calculator - Child under 12 persona + 10 years = cumulative risk 100 (red)
✓ Scan tab - Dasani pill shows score 78, PFAS HIGH, KEY CONCERN block fires
✓ 'TEST MY HOME TAP WATER' bridge button returns to Home tab
✓ Report email capture shows green success with WELCOME100 discount code
✓ Learn tab renders 6 cards with proper tags (HIGH RISK x3, EMERGING, MYTH, SOLUTION)
✓ Bottom nav dark bar (#0A1A2E) with SVG icons works on all 4 tabs with active glow state
✓ Mobile viewport (390x844) renders correctly - responsive design verified
action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix duplicate key warning in WTRHubAnimation component (line 233) - change stats array to use unique keys
critical_code_review_comments: Line 233: Array map uses value as key causing duplicate '99%+' key warning - suggest using index or unique identifiers
Overall code quality is good - well-structured single-file component with proper data-testid attributes

success_rate.design: 100% (Mobile responsive, proper colors, SVG icons with glow states)

mocked_api_status.details: All water quality data hardcoded in CITY_DATA (7 cities) and BOTTLE_BRANDS (7 brands). Works offline as expected.

context_for_next_testing_agent: App is fully functional investor demo. All 4 tabs (Home, Scan, Report, Learn) work correctly. Chicago returns score of 98 with Lead/Chromium-6/PFAS as high concerns. Dasani returns score 78. Bottom nav has dark navy background with custom SVG icons.
